head.hi: The Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs at Nanking to the Chinese Legation
head.note: Copy of telegram handed by the Chinese Chargé to Mr. Ransford S. Miller of the Division of Far Eastern Affairs, September 23.

div.p: Today’s Rengo report from Tokyo stating that the Japanese Government has decided to accept the Chinese Government’s formal proposal for the formation of a Sino-Japanese Joint Investigation Committee is not true.
The Chinese Government has never made such a proposal, formal or informal.
